column8: description
initial state — shuffleShard partitions=32 baseline 113848 ns/op
add ringPartitionIDs parallel array (subring construction overhead > inner-loop savings)
replace result/exclude maps with bool arrays (extra heap allocs eat savings)
uint64 bitset fast path for result/exclude (no alloc savings; original maps already stack-allocated)
add ringPartitionIDs array + newSubring() — eliminates per-shard token sort and map build (13% improvement)
uint64 bitset in newSubring filter loop (replaces 16384 map lookups — 65% from baseline)
replace math/rand 607-element PRNG with splitmix64 (saves 6us init per call)
compact subring: uint16 indices (8KB) replace subTokens+subPIDs (32KB) — 21% improvement, 75% less GC pressure
lazy-init ringTokenIndices: defer 8KB alloc until first token access — 74.7% improvement, 76% less B/op
share parent desc in compact subrings; skip WithPartitions alloc — 13.3% improvement, 85% less B/op
precompute per-PID token counts: O(16K) loop → O(k=8) — 82.5% improvement
bitset fast path in shuffleShard: eliminate result/exclude map allocs — 10.4% improvement
default to bounded LRU(1024) cache — eliminates map-bucket realloc madvise — 13.4% improvement
256-bucket prefix-sum index narrows searchRingToken binary search from 14→6 comparisons — 20% improvement
precompute activePartBits/pendingPartBits — eliminates inner-loop map lookups for lookbackPeriod=0 — 7.25% improvement
increase tokenBuckets to 4096 buckets (top 12 bits) — narrows binary search from ~64 to ~4 tokens — 19.6% improvement
pidTokenCounts *[64]uint16 pointer — shrinks compact subring from 320→200 bytes, 37% less GC pressure — 9.5% improvement
replace LRU cache with zero-alloc direct-mapped cache — eliminates per-insert list-node alloc — 22.8% improvement
increase tokenBuckets to 16384 buckets (top 14 bits) — O(1) token search — 8.5% improvement
